summary: Iteration 40: BOTH REGRESSION FIXES VERIFIED. FIX 1 (Staff Earnings tip attribution) - Carlos Silva correctly shows $8.60+ in tips in both shift-overview and staff-costs. FIX 2 (Bar Inside shows ALL guests) - pulse/inside returns 7 guests including Alex Turner with closed tab #105 $43.00. Frontend TAP page shows all guests with tab numbers and amounts.

FIX_1_Staff_Earnings_Tip_Attribution.description: Tips are correctly attributed to specific staff members based on bartender_id

evidence.tip_distribution: Tips go ONLY to assigned bartender, not split

FIX_2_Bar_Inside_All_Guests.description: pulse/inside returns ALL guests inside venue including those with closed tabs

evidence.frontend_display: TapPage shows 8 guests (7 seed + 1 E2E test) with name, tab number, and amount

steps_verified: Verify Carlos Silva has tip in staff-costs

seed_data_creation: E2E test created TEST_TipFlow_Guest with $5.00 tip attributed to Carlos Silva
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both regression fixes verified: (1) _calc_staff_cost in manager.py correctly matches bartender_id as both UUID and name (lowercase). (2) pulse/inside queries most recent session regardless of status (open or closed), prioritizing open sessions. TapPage merges open sessions with pulse/inside guests. Carlos Silva ID: b5f31a05-6a8c-406e-84ec-26454411aca4. API paths: /api/tap/session/open, /api/tap/session/{id}/add, /api/tap/session/{id}/close, /api/tap/session/{id}/record-tip.
